page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion SIDE STORY 2 ~ Feast of Dolls ~
text:
is a video game based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Series. It was released exclusively on Japan on the I App and V App mobile phone series on 30 May 2006. It was developed by GAINAX and Tin Machine Inc. The service is no longer available.

Story

Nene Matsukaze is a transfer student to the Tokyo-3 1st Public Junior High School that Shinji and his friends attend.
At the same time as her appearance, the atmosphere at the school begins change. A new world of EVA begins, set in Tokyo-3 1st Public Junior High School, which is slowly but surely changing. What will Nene Matsukaze bring to Shinji and his children?

Overview

Neon Genesis Evangelion SIDE STORY 2 ~ Feast of Dolls ~ is a visual novel based on the world of the TV anime Neon Genesis Evangelion with a completely original story. The progress and ending of the story change at the choices made. It was possible to save special event images from the story as wallpapers in your mobile phone. The volume of scenarios, events, and wallpaper images where increased (1.5 times) from Neon Genesis Evangelion ~SIDE STORY 1 A Midsummer Night's Dream~. https://tinmachine.co.jp/eva_gainax/evangelion2.html 

It features multiple stories and multiple endings, where the result changes depending on the choices the player made.

Development

From 14 December 2005 to 20 January 2006, during the production of ~ Feast of Dolls ~, a contest was held by GAINAX in order to choose the name and traits of this new character. https://web.archive.org/web/20080221143544/http://www.gainax.co.jp/anime/eva/backnum2005.html The winner was Nene Matsukaze.

It was presented inside the platform for the monthly fee of 315 yen (tax included). https://web.archive.org/web/20071223064254/http://www.tinmachine.co.jp/eva_gainax/eva_special.html
